title: lychnis dioica var. alba
intro: Lychnis dioica var. alba, also known as White Campion, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the evening primrose family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lychnis dioica var. alba include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting respiratory health. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and salves, to harness its medicinal properties.
